---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for Project Loom
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

## Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
If you have an idea for how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Alternatives
Are there alternative approaches to solving this problem?

## Additional Context
Any other information, such as references to related issues or pull requests.
